messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-491 — EPIC — consolidate Telegram forum topics: fold per-ticket topics into one topic per epic + one standing Backlog topic; tracks children, do not promote directly
What it solves: UMBRELLA / tracking item, not directly promotable. The actionable work is its children
(BL-492..495), sequenced by their depends_on chain. Do NOT close this epic until all four land
and the live swarm posts ticket events into epic/Backlog topics with no new per-ticket topic minted.
Approval context: The high-level routing and the three product decisions (D1 edit-in-place status message, D2 one-time close migration, D3 awaiting-approval via the Approvals topic only) were chosen by you directly (specifier asked, you answered 2026-07-17). This ticket asks you to bless the DECOMPOSITION into four …
BL-491 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-491" (or "reject BL-491 <reason>") to act.

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-491 ✅ done — EPIC — consolidate Telegram forum topics: fold per-ticket topics into one topic per epic + one standing Backlog topic; tracks children, do not promote directly
